name: newkayak12-claude-skills
description: Claude Code skills organized by topic: engineering, PM, thinking, writing, agents, and more.

plugins.name: develop
plugins.description: Engineering skills: CLI, SQL, clean architecture, clean code, DDD, pragmatic programming, database optimization, chaos engineering, Spring Boot, microservices, Kotlin, TDD, frontend, code documentation, testing, MCP builder, SRE, performance profiling & optimization, incident response, documentation strategy, and dev-quality-workflow (full dev cycle entry point).

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Product management skills: user stories, story mapping, story splitting, PRD development, contagious (STEPPS), product discovery (Inspired/Shape Up), OKR planning, hypothesis-driven development, competitive analysis, go-to-market planning, pricing & monetization, stakeholder management, metrics interpretation, feature prioritization, customer research synthesis, roadmap communication, post-launch retrospective, technical feasibility assessment, and pm-strategy-workflow (full PM cycle entry point).

plugins.name: think
plugins.description: Thinking and ideation skills: brainstorming, decision making, devil's advocate, problem reframing, retrospective, thought organizing, microinteractions design, negotiation, first-principles thinking, and deep-thinking-workflow (diverge→decompose→challenge→converge entry point).

plugins.name: write
plugins.description: Writing skills: doc co-authoring, writing plans, skill writing, writer verification, SBI feedback writing, and technical blog writing.

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Agent orchestration skills: dispatching parallel agents, subagent-driven development, and task decomposition.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Planning skills: executing implementation plans and roadmap planning.

plugins.name: skill
plugins.description: Skill management: create new skills, improve existing ones, validate skill quality, and audit trigger coverage.

plugins.name: completion
plugins.description: Verification before completion: evidence-based workflow to confirm work is done before claiming success.

plugins.name: portfolio
plugins.description: Portfolio and career skills: JD analysis, portfolio rewriting, company research, feedback, pattern extraction, interview prep, resume tailoring, and job-application-workflow (full job search cycle entry point).

plugins.name: leadership
plugins.description: Engineering leadership skills: 1-on-1 meetings for managers and ICs, engineer leveling and promotion cases, calibration conversations.

plugins.name: cognition
plugins.description: Thinking quality skills: assumption extraction, bias auditing, fallacy detection, mental models, epistemic reasoning, tradeoff articulation, question upgrading, second-order thinking, and thinking style profiling.

plugins.name: self
plugins.description: Self-reflection and personal growth skills: attachment style, ego states, examined life, fear inventory, flow and anti-goals, identity exploration, and motivation discovery.
